creator: weh@microsoft.com
text:
Created attachment 216468
Proposed patch to reserve io sapce 0xf8000000 - 0xf87fffff on HyperV

This patch is for test. It reserves 8MB mmio space from 0xf8000000 from being used by any other PCI devices on HyperV. I would expect it succeeds on Gen2 VM and fails on Gen1 VM.
